caption: A man wearing glasses, a white dress shirt with a red bowtie, and tan suspenders sits in a studio environment. He wears a large, grey, textured wig that stands tall and pointed on his head, along with black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background features a wall covered in various framed photographs and clothing displays. A white logo on the screen reads "THE GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. In the initial frames, his mouth is open and he looks forward, while in the later frames, he looks slightly downward and to the side as he continues to talk and move his hand, maintaining his seated position throughout the clip.
